title: Buttery Juicy Indian Sardine Curry
description: A quick, lowfat Indian curry that delivers a buttery sauce and succulent sardines in just minutes.

ingredients.name: Indian spice blend
ingredients.notes: cumin, coriander, turmeric, garam masala, chili powder

instructions: Heat the olive oil and butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3–4 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic, ginger, and the Indian spice blend; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Pour in the low‑fat coconut milk, bring to a gentle simmer, and let it cook for 5 minutes.
Gently fold in the drained sardines and simmer for another 2–3 minutes until heated through.
Season with salt to taste and give the curry a final stir.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately with steamed rice or whole‑wheat naan.
